Carlson Student Government 2026

A Carlson that uplifts all students.

We are advocating for real connections, career success, and a true sense of belonging in each corner of this school.

Join the Campaign Read the Platform

Listen carefully. Act decisively. Deliver for students.

for students

Real connection Career success Belonging

Our platform

A student government should listen early, act fast, and stay close to the people it serves. We want a Carlson where students can find community without pretending, build careers with real support, and trust that their concerns will lead to action. That means stronger employer connections in Minneapolis and beyond, clearer visibility into opportunities, and more honest conversations about what students actually need. It means making student government easier to reach, easier to understand, and easier to hold accountable. We are not running to sound polished. We are running to be useful, human, and relentless about follow-through.

When students are overlooked

Leadership starts to feel far away.

Feedback disappears. Opportunities stay scattered. Networking feels transactional. Students who should feel at home start to feel like they are figuring Carlson out alone.

let's change that

What becomes possible

Students feel seen, backed, and connected.

When leadership listens and follows through, students find mentors, land real opportunities, build trust faster, and feel a stronger sense of belonging in every corner of Carlson.

The pillars

A Student Government That Works For You

Student government should make your life better in ways you can actually feel: stronger opportunities, warmer connections, and a school culture where more people genuinely belong.

01

Career Success

Actionable plans to connect students with employers and resources in Minneapolis and beyond.

  • Push for tighter relationships with employers who want Carlson talent.
  • Make internships, treks, panels, and recruiting resources easier to find.
  • Support programming that turns career prep into real access, not just advice.

02

Genuine Connection

Fostering real relationships and active listening over forced networking.

  • Create more spaces for honest feedback, not just performative outreach.
  • Back student groups and cross-campus partnerships that build real friendships.
  • Keep the door open so students always know where to bring an idea or concern.

03

Belonging

Ensuring every student feels at home and represented within the Carlson community.

  • Champion a culture where more students can see themselves in campus life.
  • Support student leaders already doing the work of welcoming people in.
  • Advocate for communication, events, and traditions that feel human and inclusive.

About us

Meet Your Presidential Team

This campaign is grounded in solidarity, active listening, and a simple promise: student government should work for students in ways that are visible, useful, and immediate.

Sunbeeb

Presidential Candidate

Sunbeeb leads with warmth, urgency, and a clear belief that student government should solve real problems. The vision is a Carlson where leadership feels accessible, student voices shape decisions early, and every promise comes with follow-through students can actually see.

This campaign style is simple: show up, listen closely, tell the truth, and keep moving until students feel the difference in daily campus life.

Accessible leadership Student-first vision Accountability

Scheid

Vice Presidential Candidate

Scheid is an MIS and Business Analytics double major who knows that community does not happen by accident. As a Resident Advisor at Middlebrook Hall, Scheid has built belonging through direct day-to-day support, quick problem-solving, and real human connection.

That same energy carries into serving as President of Vocal U, where Scheid has managed group activities, led with care, and kept teams moving together. The result is a leadership style that blends systems thinking with a strong instinct for making people feel at home.

MIS + Business Analytics RA at Middlebrook Hall President of Vocal U

The promise

By representing Carlson students, we are here to listen carefully, act decisively, and deliver.

Join the campaign

Help Build The Carlson We Deserve

Sign up for updates, share what needs attention, and help shape a campaign rooted in direct student input.

Why opt in?

  • Get campaign materials you actually asked to receive.
  • Share what needs to change at Carlson.
  • Help shape outreach, events, and turnout with real feedback.

Compliance note

Submitting this form grants written permission to receive campaign materials from Sunbeeb & Scheid. That helps the campaign stay aligned with the rules against unsolicited mass messaging.

This site is independently produced and does not use university trademarks or sticker promotion.

Sunbeeb & Scheid for Students

An independent student campaign focused on connection, career success, and belonging at Carlson.
